detail.description:
▶ Lineage W – The Ultimate MMORPG: Lineage
Lineage W is a next-generation open-world MMORPG, bringing players across SEA (Southeast Asia) together on one massive, seamless battlefield.
Experience the true spirit of Lineage - loyalty, sacrifice, clan alliances, and massive warfare that forge the strongest Blood Pledges.
28 Years of Legacy.
The Ultimate PvP MMORPG.
Clans rise. Kingdoms fall.
Looking for a hardcore MMORPG with real Clan Wars, Castle Sieges, and cross-server PvP battles? Lineage W i
detail.releaseNotes:
The Ultimate Lineage MMORPG is now officially live!
Join the Ultimate Blood Battle and begin your journey today.
Exclusive SEA-only skins, special launch events, and exciting rewards are waiting for you!
